notes: Architect is model-neutral and plans work without claiming tasks.
Each task can be claimed by only one model: claude or codex.
Claiming a task creates an isolated branch and worktree.
The other model must not pick a claimed task.

tasks.title: Stabilize non-payment task and messaging UX
notes: Claimed by codex from base main at 2026-04-04T03:55:17+00:00

tasks.title: Fix bid submission permission-denied error
tasks.description: Submitting a bid fails with cloud_firestore/permission-denied. The submitBid method also updates task bidCount which requires task-level write permission the provider does not have. Fix: move bidCount increment to a Firestore trigger or adjust security rules.
notes: Claimed by claude from base main at 2026-04-04T12:57:43+00:00
Merged into main at 2026-04-04T12:59:26+00:00
Cleaned up worktree/branch after merge

tasks.title: Fix budget display format — remove trailing .0
tasks.description: Budget displays as S$60.0-S$100.0 instead of S$60-S$100. Fix budgetDisplay extension to format cleanly.
notes: Claimed by codex from base main at 2026-04-04T13:31:01+00:00
